title: gaultheria oreogena
intro: Gaultheria oreogena, also known as mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. It is native to the mountains of New Zealand and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Gaultheria oreogena can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural remedy for various ailments.
